title: Morgaon Ganesha Temple
tagline: Morgaon Ganesha Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Shri Mayureshwar Mandir or Shri Moreshwar Temple is a Hindu temple (mandir) dedicated to Ganesha, god of wisdom.
overview.description: Shri Mayureshwar Mandir or Shri Moreshwar Temple is a Hindu temple (mandir) dedicated to Ganesha, god of wisdom. It is located in Moragaon in Pune District, about 65 km away from Pune city in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The temple is the starting and ending point of a pilgrimage of eight revered Ganesha temples called Ashtavinayaka. Moragon is the foremost centre of worship of the Ganapatya sect, which considers Ganesha as the Supreme Being.

topPlaces.name: Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Mayureswar Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Tehsil Baramati in Pune district in Maharashtra, India. It is 74 km from Pune and 35 km from Daund.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Morgaon Ganesha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Morgaon Ganesha Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Morgaon Ganesha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Morgaon Ganesha Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Morgaon Ganesha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Morgaon Ganesha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Morgaon Ganesha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Morgaon Ganesha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mayureshwar Wildlife Sanctuary.
